title: MPPSC Prelims General Studies (Paper 1) - Complete Study Kit
author: Kautilya Academy Experts
description: Comprehensive 10-volume study material designed exclusively for MPPSC Prelims Paper-I (General Studies). Fully updated as per the latest MPPSC syllabus. Covers History, Geography, Polity, Economy, MP General Knowledge, Science & Tech, and Current Affairs.

title: Madhya Pradesh Ek Parichay (MP GK Guide for MPPSC & Vyapam)
author: Dr. Sanjay Gupta
description: The ultimate reference book for Madhya Pradesh General Knowledge. Crucial for MPPSC (Prelims & Mains), Vyapam, MP Police, and other state government examinations. Includes detailed maps, historical events, cultural insights, and census data.

title: Indian Polity - 7th Edition
author: M. Laxmikanth
description: An absolute must-have for civil services aspirants. The seventh edition of Indian Polity covers the constitutional framework, system of government, central, state, and local governments, union territories, and constitutional/non-constitutional bodies.

title: A Brief History of Modern India - 2026 Edition
author: Rajiv Ahir (IPS)
description: Highly recommended textbook for UPSC and State PSC history preparation. Provides a detailed chronological summary of events starting from the advent of Europeans to post-independence development, in an easy-to-read layout.

title: Quantitative Aptitude for Competitive Examinations
author: Dr. R.S. Aggarwal
description: The most widely used aptitude book for Bank PO, SSC CGL, Railways, MBA, and campus placement exams. Contains detailed conceptual explanations followed by a massive bank of practice questions with step-by-step solutions.

title: Atomic Habits: An Easy & Proven Way to Build Good Habits & Break Bad Ones
author: James Clear
description: No matter your goals, Atomic Habits offers a proven framework for improving every day. James Clear, one of the world's leading experts on habit formation, reveals practical strategies that will teach you exactly how to form good habits, break bad ones, and master the tiny behaviors that lead to remarkable results.

title: The Psychology of Money: Timeless Lessons on Wealth, Greed, and Happiness
author: Morgan Housel
description: Doing well with money isn’t necessarily about what you know. It’s about how you behave. And behavior is hard to teach, even to really smart people. Morgan Housel shares 19 short stories exploring the strange ways people think about money and teaches you how to make better sense of one of life's most important topics.

title: The Immortals of Meluha (Shiva Trilogy Book 1)
author: Amish Tripathi
description: 1900 BC. Shiva Trilogy Book 1. Read the gripping, fast-paced fantasy fiction re-imagining Lord Shiva's journey in the land of Meluha.

title: Principles of Management (DAVV University BBA Sem-1)
author: Dr. R. C. Gupta
description: Tailored study guide following the Devi Ahilya Vishwavidyalaya (DAVV) Indore syllabus for BBA Semester 1. Includes conceptual notes, solved previous years' question papers, and short review queries for exam success.

title: Science Textbook for Class X
author: NCERT Panel of Experts
description: Official Science Textbook for Class 10 published by the National Council of Educational Research and Training (NCERT). Crucial for CBSE board exam preparation.

title: Parker Vector Matte Black CT Ball Pen
author: Parker Pen Co.
description: Elegant design meets superior performance. Features a sleek matte black finish with chrome trim.

title: Classmate Premium Notebooks (6-Pack, Single Line, 172 Pages)
author: ITC Classmate
description: High-quality, eco-friendly notebooks. Whiter, smoother pages. Perfect for student revision notes.

title: Casio ClassWiz fx-991EX Scientific Calculator
author: Casio
description: High-resolution LCD display scientific calculator with 552 functions. Standard tool for engineering, physics, and competitive mathematics students.

title: Concepts of Physics - Part 1
author: Dr. H.C. Verma
description: Highly respected conceptual physics guide for JEE aspirants, engineering base work, and senior secondary students.

title: Trueman's Elementary Biology - Vol 1 (NEET Exam Guide)
author: K.N. Bhatia
description: The ultimate conceptual guide for medical aspirants preparing for NEET and other competitive health sciences exams.

title: Marketing Management - 16th Edition
author: Philip Kotler
description: The world's gold standard marketing textbook for MBA and management postgraduate courses globally.

title: Constitution of India (CLAT & Judicial Services prep)
author: Dr. M.P. Singh
description: Authoritative guide on the Indian Constitution. Recommended for LL.B., LL.M., CLAT, and Judicial Civil Services examinations.

title: Illustrated Panchatantra - Treasury of Stories
author: Vishnu Sharma
description: A collection of beautiful moral stories illustrated in full color for kids and young readers.

title: [USED] MPPSC GS Prelims Topicwise Solved Papers (2012-2023)
author: Vidhya Store Verified
description: Pre-owned copy in excellent condition. Clean pages with minimal pencil markings. Ideal for cheap reference practice.

title: [USED] Indian Polity - 6th Revised Edition
author: M. Laxmikanth
description: Secondhand copy of the sixth revised edition of Indian Polity. Structural bindings intact, minor highlights inside.

title: Ikigai: The Japanese Secret to a Long and Happy Life
author: Hector Garcia
description: Find your 'ikigai' (reason for being) and learn how to secure happy longevity, mindfulness, and healthy habits.

title: The 48 Laws of Power
author: Robert Greene
description: Amoral, cunning, ruthless, and instructive Distills 3,000 years of the history of power into 48 well-explicated laws. Synthesizes the philosophies of Machiavelli, Sun-tzu, and Clausewitz.
